headline: Q4 Rundown: Molson Coors (NYSE:TAP) Vs Other Beverages, Alcohol, and Tobacco Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Molson Coors (NYSE:TAP) and the best and worst performers in the beverages, alcohol, and tobacco industry.

headline: Molson Coors Beverage Company Appoints Will Meijer as President, Canada Sales
summary: TORONTO, March 18, 2026--Molson Coors Beverage Company ("Molson Coors" or "the company") (NYSE: TAP, TAP.A; TSX: TPX.A, TPX.B) today announced that Will Meijer will join the company on April 13 as president, Canada sales. Based in Toronto, Meijer will serve on the company’s senior leadership team, reporting to President and Chief Executive Officer Rahul Goyal.

Based in Toronto, Meijer will serve on the company’s senior leadership team, reporting to President and Chief Executive Officer Rahul Goyal.
